content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad gap-up across pharma, FMCG, defense, capital goods, and financials following positive global cues (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Multiple holdings show strong unrealized gains at the open. Priority is to lock in gains by trailing SLs to breakeven/positive on the runners rather than chasing new entries into a gap.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Trail SL from 1030 to 1035 (just below S1 1035.43, ~2% below CMP, locks in +5.2%). Q4 strong, GNPA <1%, sector tailwind intact. Trail-gap >1% maintained."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Below breakeven; SL 121 (~2.5% below CMP) appropriate. Defensive hold, no MODIFY warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1725.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Stock at ATH on strong Q4 (PAT +9%, revenue +26%, 500MMT cargo milestone). Trail SL from 1720 to 1725 (still ~1.8% below CMP, locks in +1.5%). Promoter stake-sale and FY27 slowdown caution argues for tight trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Move SL from 4530 to 4555 (just below entry, ~1.6% below CMP). Defense sector tailwind intact, order book Rs 2.54T, +18% defense budget. Maintain trail-gap >1%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL already at breakeven 6900 (~2.1% below CMP). Q4 EBITDA +80%, PAT +124%, ATH 7208 just above. Hold target 7400. No change needed but SL at breakeven is correct — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Gap-up +9.84% but pulled back from 862 high to 845. Pre-results event (Q4 due May). SL 820 (~3% below CMP) appropriate; not yet at +2% threshold for breakeven move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = flat. But stock made new 52-wk high 372.50 today on strong Q4 (ROA +63bps, VNB +260bps). Tighten SL from 358 to 365 (~1% below CMP, just below VWAP 368). Reduces risk-budget with thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22%, 9% volume growth, ATH today. Trail SL from 805 to 815 (~0.9% below CMP — slightly under 1% gap, but position barely above entry; alternative HOLD also fine). Adjusting to 815 keeps thesis intact with risk reduced."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1340.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 PAT +124% (one-time aided), revenue +30%, 10% upper circuit yesterday. Move SL from 1245 to 1260 (just above entry, ~1.5% below CMP). Lift target to 1340 reflecting circuit revision to 1344."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. +9.2% intraday on defense rally. Trail SL from 2960 to 2980 (~1.8% below CMP). Stock up ~49% in April so overbought; tighter trail prudent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Q4 record results, +10.5% gap-up. Move SL from 788 to 798 (~1.2% below CMP, just below entry). Locks in some risk reduction while leaving room for the breakout to extend."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in +5% gain"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below entry, SL appropriate"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1725.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gain at ATH"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL closer to entry"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 6900"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-results, leave room"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten on 52w high"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH on strong Q4"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock entry on circuit move"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "reasoning": "Overbought, tight trail"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Reduce risk on Q4 pop"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN, DABUR, BIOCON, BHARATFORG, BSE all reporting today — binary event, NO_ACTION on entries per Rule 11. AUROPHARMA gap-up of +7.6% post-Q4 (already reported May 5) but promoter pledge increase 17.5%→23.7% is a governance flag — pass. HFCL has stale OPEN BUY @ 133.50 from yesterday; CMP per market move likely above limit — let it expire/cancel later if not filled. SRF, VEDL, M&M, GABRIEL, CHOLAHLDNG noted but no entries today — book is already heavy with 11 CNC positions and gap-up across the board makes new entries chase-y.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed across 11 CNC positions, mostly opened today (held 0 days) at the gap-up open. Priority is risk management via SL trailing, not adding more. Cumulative P&L -53.72% from prior failures means capital preservation is paramount. No new entries today — focus on monitoring and trailing. Will revisit late-morning if any holding shows 4%+ unrealized gain to apply tier-(b) trail."
}
